_description: Registry of all scanners. Pipeline runner reads this to determine which scanners are due. Updated by each scanner on successful completion (last_run_utc, last_run_signals, last_run_status).

_cadence_policy.daily: run once per UTC day — skip if last_run_utc is today
_cadence_policy.weekly: run once per UTC week — skip if last_run_utc is within last 7d

scanners.name: edgar_filing_monitor
scanners.notes: Flagship EDGAR path: budgeted full keyword coverage by default, merger-sibling suppression enabled for activist 8-K, issuer/SPAC filter enabled, and market-cap triage floor set to $215M.

scanners.name: pre_phase3_readout_scanner
scanners.notes: Added 2026-04-20 S69. Pre-edge Phase 3 readout scanner per D-013. Queries CT.gov v2 for industry-sponsored Phase 3 trials with PrimaryCompletionDate in next 90d and OverallStatus ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING/COMPLETED. Scores via binary_catalyst rubric with approval_probability seeded from config/phase3_approval_base_rates.json. Triage gate: >=3 of 5 patterns + INDUSTRY sponsor. Sponsor->ticker resolution happens downstream via openfigi_resolver.

scanners.name: insider_form4_scanner
scanners.notes: Added 2026-04-22 S70. SEC Section 16 Form 4 insider cluster detector. Fills the Form 4 gap called out in profile_short_positioning.md:3 ('once scanner is built') and consumed by the Form 4 cluster rubric at lines 47-55. Scans EDGAR EFTS for Form 4 + 4/A filings in last 14 days, parses primary_doc.xml, aggregates non-derivative discretionary transactions (codes P/S) by issuer CIK within a 30-day window, filters out 10b5-1 plan sales, dedups affiliated reporting owners by first-token normalization, emits insider_cluster_buy/sell (>=2 holders), solo c_suite_open_market_buy, and solo ten_percent_holder_buy. Runs 21 UTC daily (post-close, after most Form 4 filings land). Emissions route to short_positioning profile; dim_estimator branches on insider_cluster=True to apply the C-suite-weighted cluster tier rather than the ESMA holder-count tier.
